flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Rowan College of South Jersey-Gloucester Campus fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (4.7k → 4.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rowan College of South Jersey-Gloucester Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Rowan College of South Jersey-Gloucester Campus rose 33% between 2006 and 2009 (15.0% → 19.9%).
